testcase.name: deveRetornar500QuandoServicoFalha
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-05T08:46:17.778-03:00 INFO 16308 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.backend.BeneficioControllerTest$ListarTodos]: ListarTodos does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-05T08:46:17.791-03:00 INFO 16308 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.backend.BackendApplication for test class com.example.backend.BeneficioControllerTest$ListarTodos 2026-03-05T08:46:17.799-03:00 ERROR 16308 --- [ main] c.e.b.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler : Erro inesperado em [GET] /api/v1/beneficios: Erro inesperado
